commands.name: clone
commands.reason: smart-HTTP transport needs an in-page server; deferred to 19.8 (Workers runtime parity bring up an in-process HTTP harness reusable here).

commands.name: fetch
commands.reason: smart-HTTP transport needs an in-page server; deferred to 19.8.

commands.name: fetchMissing
commands.reason: partial-clone lazy fetch uses the same transport path as fetch; deferred with the transport bundle.

commands.name: pull
commands.reason: pull = fetch + merge; its fetch step needs the same in-page smart-HTTP server as clone/fetch/push; deferred to 19.8.

commands.name: push
commands.reason: smart-HTTP transport needs an in-page server; deferred to 19.8.

primitives.name: runHook
primitives.reason: browser facade has no HookRunner by adapter design (.git/hooks/* spawn POSIX processes that do not exist in OPFS).
